extraction.one_line_summary: KITTEL Marcel won Stage 11 sprint from deep in the pack after BODNAR Maciej's solo breakaway was caught inside 500m.
tactical_patterns: BODNAR held 40s at 10km-to-go as solo breakaway versus peloton, demonstrating time-trial power extending into late-stage resistance.
FROOME positioned aggressively near front in closing kilometers on flat sprint stage, prioritizing crash avoidance over traditional GC positioning.
Sprint trains caught BODNAR only inside 500m despite peloton speed, revealing corners prolonged breakaway viability in urban finale.

rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: positive: Fifth stage win showing wheel-surfing precision ('jumping wheel to wheel') rather than pure leadout dependency
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Tactical discipline positioning near sprinters in nervous finale, explicitly avoiding GC riders' crash fate
rider_signals.BODNAR Maciej: positive: Time-trial engine translated to 30km+ solo resistance, nearly defeating organized sprint teams through corners
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Required medical attention twice for wrist injury pre-Pyrenees, severely compromised for handlebar-intensive climbing
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Multiple mechanicals/crashes reveal declining race fortune, 5:15 down with body language showing mental defeat
